title: Initial setup
summary: Bootstrapped Next.js 15 + TypeScript project with Biome for linting/formatting, Vitest for unit tests, and Playwright for e2e tests. All 5 verification commands pass.
details: Created Next.js 15 App Router project with React 19 and TypeScript
Configured Biome for linting and formatting (tab indentation, 100 char line width)
Set up Vitest with jsdom environment, @/* path alias, and @testing-library/jest-dom matchers
Configured Playwright targeting localhost:3000 with Chromium
Created minimal app skeleton: root layout, home page with h1, and global CSS reset
Added unit test for home page heading using @testing-library/react
Added e2e test for home page heading using Playwright
Installed Node 22 via mise; ran biome auto-format and playwright install chromium
